title: Bio-Rad iProof High-Fidelity PCR
description: Bio-Rad iProof High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase: 50 uL high-fidelity reaction with a 98 C denaturation and 72 C extension.

payload.notes: Vendor: Bio-Rad, iProof High-Fidelity DNA Polymerase (Cat. 172-5300). Set up on ice and add iProof last. Use 5X iProof HF Buffer by default (lower error rate); switch to 5X GC Buffer for GC-rich or difficult templates. Annealing: for primers >20 nt anneal ~3 C above the lower-Tm primer (nearest-neighbor Tm); for primers <20 nt anneal at the lower primer Tm. The 60 C shown is a placeholder starting point. Cycles 25-35. Extension 15 sec/kb (low-complexity) to 30 sec/kb (genomic); do not exceed 1 min/kb for amplicons >5 kb. For GC-rich add 3% DMSO. iProof produces blunt ends. The cycling table does not list a hold step. Source: https://www.bio-rad.com/webroot/web/pdf/lsr/literature/10002298B.pdf
